top_signals.title: China May wholesale prices hit near 4-year highs on Iran war, AI costs; consumer inflation misses
top_signals.summary: Price growth has been boosted by a surge in global commodity costs, as the Middle East conflict disrupted energy and raw material flows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Wage gains at Japan’s smaller firms at risk as Iran war drags on
top_signals.summary: Many of such companies lack the pricing power to fully pass rising costs on to customers because of intense competition and entrenched business practices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Indian economy, government finances, see mounting costs from Iran war - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Indian economy, government finances, see mounting costs from Iran war  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Apotex, Backers Raise $932 Million in Canada IPO Priced at Top
top_signals.summary: Apotex Health Corp. and some of its backers raised C$1.3 billion ($932 million) in a Toronto initial public offering, the country’s largest since 2021.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Steve Hilton advances to general election for California governor
top_signals.summary: David Cameron’s former adviser to face Democrat Xavier Becerra on November ballot

top_signals.title: SAP fixes critical flaws in NetWeaver and Commerce Cloud
top_signals.summary: SAP has released fixes for 15 vulnerabilities as part of its June 2026 Security Patch package, including four critical-severity flaws affecting SAP NetWeaver and SAP Commerce Cloud. [...]
